name: ConcatenatedComponentExtractor
description: Extracts components concatenated by the bundler

name: NoTrack
description: Disable Discord's tracking (analytics/metrics), performance metrics, and Sentry crash reports

name: Settings
description: Adds the settings UI and debug info

name: SupportHelper
description: Helps us help you

name: AlwaysExpandRoles
description: Automatically expands the roles list in profiles

name: AutoDNDWhilePlaying
description: Automatically sets your status to Do Not Disturb while playing a game

name: BetterGifAltText
description: Changes the Alt Text of GIFs from just 'GIF' to include the GIF tags or file name.

name: BetterGifPicker
description: Improves the GIF picker and adds category filtering

name: BetterRoleDot
description: Replaces the role color dot next to names with the role's custom emoji

name: BetterUploadButton
description: Upload a file with one click, open the menu with right click

name: BlurNSFW
description: Automatically blurs NSFW images and videos

name: ClearURLs
description: Automatically removes tracking elements from URLs you send

name: ColorSighted
description: Removes colorblind-specific status icons, as Discord was from 2015-2017

name: ConsoleShortcuts
description: Adds shorter aliases for many window things. Run `shortcutList` for the list.

name: CrashHandler
description: Handles Discord crashes and enables recovery

name: CustomCommands
description: Adds custom commands to replace text in your messages

name: CustomIdle
description: Allows setting a custom timeout before changing status to idle

name: DisableCallIdle
description: Prevents automatic disconnection from a private voice call after 3 minutes of inactivity and being moved to the AFK channel.

name: DontRoundMyTimestamps
description: Always rounds relative timestamps down, so 7.6 years becomes 7 years instead of 8

name: F8Break
description: Pauses the application when pressing F8 while DevTools are open.

name: FixCodeblockGap
description: Removes the extra gap between code blocks and the text below them

name: ForceOwnerCrown
description: Always shows the owner crown next to their name, even in large servers.

name: FriendInvites
description: Create and manage friend invite links via slash commands.

name: GifPaste
description: Makes selecting a GIF paste its link into the chatbox instead of sending it immediately

name: ILoveSpam
description: Does not hide messages from users suspected of being spammers

name: ImageFilename
description: Shows the original filename instead of a modified name

name: ImageLink
description: Does not hide image links in messages even if they are the only content

name: ImplicitRelationships
description: Adds unofficial DM channels to the friends list

name: IrcColors
description: Adds IRC colors to messages

name: KeepCurrentChannel
description: Attempts to return to the channel you were in before switching accounts or restarting Discord

name: LoadingQuotes
description: Changes the loading screen quotes

name: MessageClickActions
description: Adds actions when clicking on messages

name: MoreQuickReactions
description: Adds more quick reactions

name: NoBlockedMessages
description: Completely hides messages from blocked users

name: DisableDeepLinks
description: Disables the Deep Linking feature that forces you to use the desktop app

name: NoDevtoolsWarning
description: Disables the 'HOLD UP' warning in the console and prevents Discord from hiding your token to avoid random logouts.

name: NoF1
description: Disables the F1 help shortcut.

name: NoMaskedUrlPaste
description: Pasting a link with selected text will not convert it into a masked URL

name: NoMiddleClickPaste
description: Disables middle-click paste on Linux - Linux only

name: NoMosaic
description: Removes the mosaic layout for multiple images

name: NoOnboardingDelay
description: Skips the slow and annoying onboarding delay

name: NoPendingCount
description: Removes the count badge from the pending requests icon

name: NoProfileThemes
description: Removes Nitro profile themes from other users' profiles while keeping your own

name: NoSystemBadge
description: Disables the unread message count badge in the taskbar and system tray.

name: NoServerEmojis
description: Prevents Discord from converting emoji text into server emoji images

name: NoTypingAnimation
description: Disables the resource-consuming typing dots animation

name: NoUnblockToJump
description: Allows jumping to messages from blocked and ignored users without needing to unblock them

name: NotificationVolume
description: Allows adjusting notification volume independently

name: OnePingPerDM
description: Sends only one notification per DM conversation

name: OpenInApp
description: Opens external application links directly in their native apps

name: PermissionFreeWill
description: Disables client-side restrictions when managing channel permissions.

name: PetPet
description: Adds a /petpet command to create animated GIFs from any image

name: PlainFolderIcon
description: Hides the small server icons inside folders

name: QuickReply
description: Enables quick reply by pressing R without opening a menu

name: ReactErrorDecoder
description: Translates React error codes into understandable messages

name: RelationshipNotifier
description: Notifies you when you are removed from a friend list, group chat, or server.

name: RevealAllSpoilers
description: Reveal all spoilers by Ctrl+Click on a spoiler, or in the chat with Ctrl+Shift+Click

name: SecretRingToneEnabler
description: Changes the call ringtone

name: ShowAllMessageButtons
description: Always shows all message buttons without hovering

name: ShowHiddenThings
description: Shows hidden and moderator-only elements regardless of permissions.

name: SpotifyCrack
description: Improves the Spotify experience with Discord

name: SpotifyShareCommands
description: Share your current Spotify track, album, or artist via commands (/track, /album, /artist)

name: SuperReactionTweaks
description: Allows customizing super reactions

name: StickerPaste
description: Makes selecting a sticker in the sticker picker insert it into the chat box instead of sending it immediately

name: StreamerModeOn
description: Automatically enables streamer mode when you start streaming in Discord

name: ThemeAttributes
description: Adds data attributes to various elements for theme customization purposes

name: Unindent
description: Removes indentation from code blocks

name: UnlockedAvatarZoom
description: Allows zooming avatars beyond the usual limit

name: UserMessagesPronouns
description: Adds pronouns to user messages in chat

name: ValidReply
description: Fixes the message not found error in replies

name: VoiceChatDoubleClick
description: Join voice channels with a double click instead of a single click

name: VolumeBooster
description: Allows raising the volume above 200%

name: WebContextMenus
description: Re-adds native context menus in the web version

name: WebScreenShareFixes
description: Removes the 2500kbps bitrate cap on Chromium and Vesktop clients.

name: WebKeybinds
description: Re-adds keybinds missing from the Discord web version: ctrl+t, ctrl+shift+t, ctrl+tab, ctrl+1-9, ctrl+,. Only fully works on Vesktop/Legcord

name: YoutubeAdblock
description: Blocks ads in embedded YouTube videos and WatchTogether activity via AdGuard

name: AlwaysAnimate
description: Always animates avatars and animated emojis even without Nitro

name: AccountPanelServerProfile
description: Shows the server profile instead of the global profile when clicking your account panel

name: AlwaysTrust
description: Removes verification messages and warning popups when opening external links or downloading files

name: AnonymiseFileNames
description: Anonymises file names before uploading

name: WebRichPresence
description: arRPC client for Discord Web (experimental)

name: BetterFolders
description: Adds enhancements to server folders

name: AppleMusicRichPresence
description: Displays your Apple Music activity

name: BetterRoleContext
description: Adds options to copy role color / edit role / view role icon when right clicking roles in the user profile or in the member list

name: BetterSettings
description: Improves the Discord settings interface with visual effects

name: BetterSessions
description: Enhances the devices sessions page and adds identifying labels

name: BiggerStreamPreview
description: Allows viewing stream previews at a larger size

name: CallTimer
description: Adds a timer to voice calls

name: CharacterCounter
description: Adds a character counter to the chat input box

name: ClientTheme
description: Recreates the old theme experience. Add a custom color to your Discord theme

name: ConsoleJanitor
description: Hides useless log messages from the console

name: CopyEmojiMarkdown
description: Adds an option to copy emojis as raw markup

name: CopyFileContents
description: Adds a button to text file attachments to copy their contents

name: CopyStickerLinks
description: Adds the ability to copy and open sticker links

name: CopyUserURLs
description: Adds a 'Copy User URL' option to the user context menu.

name: CustomRPC
description: Adds a fully customizable Rich Presence activity to your Discord profile

name: Dearrow
description: Improves YouTube titles and thumbnails using DeArrow

name: Decor
description: Create and use your own custom avatar decorations, or choose from ready-made templates.

name: Experiments
description: Enables access to experimental developer features in Discord

name: DevCompanion
description: Vencord developer tool for debugging

name: ExpressionCloner
description: Allows cloning emojis and stickers to your server (right-click them)

name: FakeNitro
description: Allows sending paid emojis, stickers, and streaming with Nitro quality

name: FakeProfileThemes
description: Customizes profile colors using invisible 3y3 encoding

name: FavoriteEmojiFirst
description: Shows your favorite emojis at the top of the emoji list

name: FavoriteGifSearch
description: Enables searching through favorite GIFs

name: FixYoutubeEmbeds
description: Fixes the preview of embedded YouTube videos

name: FixImagesQuality
description: Restores image quality to the highest possible resolution

name: FixSpotifyEmbeds
description: Fixes the Spotify session expiry issue in embeds

name: FriendsSince
description: Shows the date you became friends with someone in the user info panel

name: FullUserInChatbox
description: Adds extra functionality to user mentions in the chatbox such as right and left click

name: FullSearchContext
description: Adds all message context menu options in search results

name: GameActivityToggle
description: Adds a button to quickly enable/disable game activity

name: GreetStickerPicker
description: Improves the greet sticker picker

name: HideMedia
description: Hides attachments and embeds for specific messages via a button that appears on hover

name: IgnoreActivities
description: Allows ignoring specific activities from appearing in your status

name: ImageZoom
description: Allows zooming images by dragging and panning

name: LastFMRichPresence
description: Shows what you are listening to on Last.fm as a status

name: MemberCount
description: Shows the member count for the server and channel

name: MessageLatency
description: Shows an indicator for messages that took ≥n seconds to send

name: MentionAvatars
description: Adds avatars next to mentions in messages

name: MessageLinkEmbeds
description: Adds a preview for message links wrapped in <>

name: MessageLogger
description: Saves deleted and edited messages

name: MutualGroupDMs
description: Shows mutual group DMs in user profiles

name: NewGuildSettings
description: Allows setting default settings for every server you join

name: NoReplyMention
description: Automatically removes the mention notification from replies

name: OverrideForumDefaults
description: Allows customizing the default settings for forum channels

name: PermissionsViewer
description: Shows server and role permissions in detail

name: PauseInvitesForever
description: Restores the option to pause invites forever that Discord removed.

name: PictureInPicture
description: Adds Picture-in-Picture mode support for videos

name: PinDMs
description: Allows pinning DMs to the top of the list

name: PlatformIndicators
description: Displays the device icon next to the username

name: PreviewMessage
description: Allows you to preview your message before sending it.

name: QuickMention
description: Adds a quick mention button to the message action bar

name: ReadAllNotificationsButton
description: Read all server notifications with a single button click!

name: ReplaceGoogleSearch
description: Replaces the Google search engine with one of your choice

name: ReplyTimestamp
description: Shows the timestamp on replied message previews

name: ReverseImageSearch
description: Adds a reverse image search option to the context menu

name: ReviewDB
description: Allows rating other users (adds a reviews section to profiles)

name: RoleColorEverywhere
description: Applies role colors to names everywhere in Discord

name: Summaries
description: Enables viewing summaries of long conversations

name: ServerInfo
description: Shows detailed information about the server

name: SendTimestamps
description: Adds a command to send a formatted timestamp

name: ServerListIndicators
description: Adds visual indicators in the server list

name: ShikiCodeblocks
description: Brings VSCode-style code blocks to Discord powered by Shiki

name: ShowConnections
description: Shows linked accounts in the mini profile

name: ShowHiddenChannels
description: Shows hidden channels while indicating they are inaccessible

name: ShowMeYourName
description: Shows the original username next to the nickname

name: ShowTimeoutDuration
description: Shows the remaining timeout duration next to the username

name: SilentMessageToggle
description: Adds a button to enable/disable silent messages

name: SortFriends
description: Sorts friend requests by date

name: SilentTyping
description: Prevents your typing indicator from showing to others

name: StartupTimings
description: Adds startup timings to the settings menu

name: TextReplace
description: Automatically replaces text while typing using custom rules

name: Translate
description: Translate messages using Google Translate, DeepL, or Kagi.

name: TypingIndicator
description: Shows who is typing in other channels

name: TypingTweaks
description: Enhances the typing indicator with avatars and names

name: UnsuppressEmbeds
description: Allows you to unsuppress embeds in messages

name: UserVoiceShow
description: Shows the voice channel a user is in on their profile

name: USRBG
description: Adds a custom profile background via USRBG

name: ValidUser
description: Adds proper validation to user mentions

name: VcNarrator
description: Announces via the narrator when users join, leave, or move between voice channels

name: ViewIcons
description: Allows viewing server and user icons in full resolution

name: ViewRaw
description: Shows the raw code for messages and embeds

name: VoiceDownload
description: Adds a download button for voice messages. (Opens a new browser tab)

name: VoiceMessages
description: Allows you to send voice messages like on mobile. To do so, right click the upload button and click Send Voice Message

name: XSOverlay
description: Supports the XSOverlay VR overlay

name: WhoReacted
description: Shows a list of who reacted to each reaction on hover
